name: WhatsApp Scheduling Agent MVP (CDMX + Bogota Dental)
description: Build an MVP for independent dental clinics in CDMX and Bogota that reduces no-shows and front-desk workload through WhatsApp-based appointment confirmation, rescheduling, and cancellation with dynamic single-provider availability.

userStories.title: Clinic and provider setup
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to configure clinic and provider schedule basics so that the system can compute availability.
acceptanceCriteria: Add schema tables for clinic, provider, provider weekly schedule, and appointments in convex/schema.ts.
Support weekly schedule windows, fixed appointment duration, slot step, lead time, and booking horizon.
Seed/create flow exists to create one clinic + one provider + schedule in local/dev environment.

userStories.title: Appointment source-of-truth in custom DB
userStories.description: As front desk staff, I want appointments stored in one internal system so that WhatsApp actions can safely update them.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Convex mutations/queries for create/read/update appointment status in convex/scheduling.ts (or equivalent domain file).
Appointment model supports states: scheduled, canceled, with confirm timestamp.
Every status-changing mutation is idempotent for retry safety.

userStories.title: Dynamic availability engine
userStories.description: As the agent, I want to retrieve only valid open slots so that patients can reschedule without double-booking.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement slot search using provider weekly windows, lead time, booking horizon, and fixed duration.
Exclude conflicts with existing scheduled appointments.
Return top N candidate slots in clinic-local time labels and UTC timestamps.
Reject booking attempts for stale/occupied slots.

userStories.title: Outbound reminder campaign
userStories.description: As front desk staff, I want automatic T-24h reminders so that patients can confirm or act without a phone call.
acceptanceCriteria: Add scheduled job/action to find upcoming appointments and send reminder templates via Kapso.
Reminder template contains clear actions: confirm, reschedule, cancel.
Outbound message records are stored with status metadata for audit/debug.

userStories.title: WhatsApp inbound webhook ingestion
userStories.description: As the system, I want to ingest inbound WhatsApp events so that patient responses trigger workflow updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Add webhook endpoint in convex/http.ts for Kapso events.
Validate webhook signature and enforce idempotency key handling.
Persist inbound messages and thread state linked to clinic + patient phone.

userStories.title: Agent tool orchestration
userStories.description: As a patient, I want natural chat in Spanish that still results in precise scheduling actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent handles intents: confirm, reschedule, cancel, human handoff.
Agent uses tools/functions for availability lookup and booking writes; no free-text invented times.
On low confidence or unsupported request, agent routes to human handoff state.
Conversation state supports awaiting slot pick and completion back to idle.

userStories.title: Reschedule/confirm/cancel transaction flow
userStories.description: As a patient, I want my selected action reflected immediately so that I trust the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm action marks appointment confirmed and returns confirmation message.
Cancel action marks appointment canceled and returns cancellation message.
Reschedule action updates appointment start/end to selected valid slot and returns new confirmation.
All three actions produce consistent DB + WhatsApp message history.

userStories.title: Minimal operations console
userStories.description: As front desk staff, I want a simple view of active conversations and statuses so that I can intervene when needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Add minimal UI in src/ showing upcoming appointments and conversation state.
Include manual handoff control and visible handoff status.
UI clearly shows last inbound/outbound message timestamps per thread.
Browser verification confirms usability on desktop and mobile viewport.

userStories.title: Pilot analytics and ROI output
userStories.description: As founder, I want pilot metrics captured weekly so that I can sell with outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: Track baseline and weekly metrics: no-shows, confirmations, reschedules, cancellations, inbound call proxy.
Export/produce clinic-level weekly summary for 5 pilots.
Case-study template is generated with before/after metrics for at least one clinic.

userStories.title: Founder-led GTM pilot pipeline
userStories.description: As founder, I want a defined outreach and onboarding motion so that we can close 5 paid pilots quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Define ICP list and outreach script for CDMX and Bogota dental clinics.
Define paid pilot offer, pricing structure, and onboarding checklist.
Define weekly cadence: outreach volume, demos booked, pilots activated, retention checkpoints.
